title: Sunrun Q4 2024 Earnings Report - Earnings Beat
text: Sunrun delivered significant earnings surprise, posting quarterly earnings of $1.41 per share, vastly exceeding analyst expectations of $0.27 loss—a 622.22% surprise factor demonstrating strong performance recovery compared to prior year's $1.33 loss per share. Despite earnings triumph, Sunrun fell slightly short on top line generating $518.49 million in quarterly revenue, missing consensus estimates by 3.70%, though figure remained essentially flat year-over-year compared to $516.59 million prior period. Over last four quarters, company surpassed consensus EPS estimates three times while revenue picture proved less consistent, with firm topping consensus expectations just once over same period. Sunrun shares underperformed broader market, declining approximately 9.3% year-to-date versus S&P 500's 1.3% gain. Stock currently holds Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) rating, suggesting near-term performance aligned with market averages. Forward guidance projects quarterly loss of $0.32 per share on $510.26 million in revenues, indicating return to negative earnings territory in near term.
